page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.4xlarge is a storage and memory-optimized server instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, indicating a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration with no hyperthreading.

The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance is equipped with a bundled 3839 GB SSD. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 40 Gbps, while public IPv4 addresses are not included by default.

This resource profile offers high qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring substantial local storage capacity and dedicated CPU execution without thread sharing. The combination of dedicated Intel Xeon cores, a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, and a large local SSD makes this instance suitable for relational databases, NoSQL storage engines, data warehousing, and localized transactional processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.4xlarge is a storage and memory-optimized server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor with 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs running at 3.4 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration delivers 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core ratio, alongside a bundled 3839 GB local SSD. Network performance is anchored by a baseline bandwidth of 40 Gbps. With dedicated CPU allocation and a 1.0 thread-per-core topology, this instance provides predictable compute performance and high local storage capacity. It is designed for resource-intensive workloads such as relational databases, distributed file systems, and transactional data processing.

tagline: A dedicated Intel Xeon server featuring high-capacity local SSD storage and balanced memory allocation for demanding database workloads.
